metadata.description: 线程局部存储 TLS: The `threading.local()` object provides thread-local data in each thread. Thread-local data is isolated among threads. Here's an example to illustrate this concept using Python: ```python import threading # Create a local object local_data = threading.local() def process_data(): # Each thread gets its own instance of 'value' local_data.value = 100 print(f"Thread {threading.current_thread().name}: value is {local_data.value}") # Create threads threads = [] for i in range(3): t = threading.Thread(target=process_data, name=f'Thread-{i+1}') threads.append(t) t.start() # Wait for all threads to complete for t in threads: t.join() ``` In this example, each thread has its own `value` attribute stored independently of the others.

data_pointers.title: 线程局部存储 TLS
